title: Improved recipes
description: Enhance your Minecraft gameplay with this mod that allows you to craft 4 strings from 1 block of wool, easily create name tags, chain mail armor and horse armor with specific crafting recipes, ensuring your adventures are practical and stylish.
body:
Enhance your Minecraft experience with our versatile mod designed to simplify crafting and 
elevate your gameplay.

**Key Features:**

- **Efficient String Crafting:** Transform a single block of wool into 4 strings, making it easier than ever to gather the materials needed for bows, crossbows, fishing rods, and more. 
- **Craftable Name Tags:** Never rely on luck again to find a name tag. With just 2 pieces of paper and 3 strings, you can craft a name tag anytime you want, allowing you to name your favorite pets whenever the need arises.
- **Chain Mail Armor:** Equip your character with chainmail armor, which reduces damage taken from hostile monsters, ensuring you stay safe in the heat of battle.
- **Horse Armor Crafting:** Protect your loyal steeds with craftable horse armor available in iron, gold, and diamond variants. Whether gearing up for an epic battle or a peaceful ride, your horse will be both protected and stylish. 
- **Show Off Your Ride:** Impress your friends by riding a horse outfitted in dazzling diamond armor. Make a statement with both grace and strength.

This mod is perfect for players looking to streamline their crafting process and add a touch of 
personalization and protection to their Minecraft adventures. Download now and take your 
game to the next level!


To use this mod, you need to install the Fabric API:
https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api


**Detailed Crafting Recipes**

Crafting Details:
- **Efficient String Gathering:** Convert 1 block of wool into 4 strings, optimizing your resource collection for crafting bows, crossbows, and fishing rods.
- **Craftable Name Tags**: Easily create name tags with 2 pieces of paper and 3 strings, ensuring you can name your pets whenever you desire.
- **Chain Mail Armor Crafting**: Stay protected by crafting:
  - **Chainmail Helmet:** Requires 5 chains.
  - **Chainmail Chestplate:** Requires 8 chains.
  - **Chainmail Leggings:** Requires 7 chains.
  - **Chainmail Boots:** Requires 4 chains.
- **Horse Armor Crafting:** Protect your trusty steeds with crafted armor:
  - **Iron Armor:** Requires 6 iron ingots.
  - **Gold Armor:** Requires 6 gold ingots.
  - **Diamond Armor:** Requires 6 diamonds.
  
 Each armor type offers unique benefits, from durability to prestige, ensuring your horses are 
ready for any adventure or battle.
